introSection: Rhino Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It opened in 1992.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and light brown supports.

fullText:
Rhino Coaster is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It opened in 1992.





Yellow track and light brown supports.
